name: Buffer Access Using Size of Source Buffer
description: The product uses the size of a source buffer when reading from or writing to a destination buffer, which may cause out-of-bounds memory access when the destination is smaller than the source. For example, using sizeof(source) instead of sizeof(dest) in strncpy.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node performs a buffer copy using a length derived from the source STORAGE node's size rather than the destination STORAGE node's size, without a CONTROL node verifying destination capacity.
